title: Init Taxonomy Artifact
acceptance_criteria: buildInitFabricPlan includes taxonomyPath, taxonomyAction, and taxonomyContent.
The artifact is Markdown-only and includes L0/L1/L2 definitions, initial bucket logic, and evolution guide.
Existing non-destructive init behavior remains intact.

implementation.description: Write failing init tests for plan-only and execution behavior around .fabric/INITIAL_TAXONOMY.md.
implementation.expected_failure: Tests fail because taxonomy fields and file writing do not exist.

implementation.description: Add taxonomy plan fields, deterministic Markdown generation, file write, and result metadata.
Extract taxonomy Markdown generation into a focused helper and update initialization docs.
quality_checks: Existing overwrite guards apply to taxonomy file.
